title: Complete public documentation audit
acceptance_criteria: Review curated public docs set end-to-end
Confirm no conflicting setup or deployment steps
Archive or mark non-public docs clearly

title: Remove unsafe default credentials from docs
Validate build and test steps on clean checkout
acceptance_criteria: Run web build (npm run build) successfully

title: Triage npm audit vulnerabilities
acceptance_criteria: Run npm audit and capture findings

title: Run history-aware secrets scan
acceptance_criteria: Run gitleaks (or equivalent) against full git history

title: Remove inline credentials from tooling configs
acceptance_criteria: VS Code settings and launch configs use env vars
Docs use placeholders for example credentials

title: Select license and publish attribution inventory
acceptance_criteria: Add LICENSE file with approved license text
Create attribution inventory for Go and web dependencies

title: Add readiness validation to CI
acceptance_criteria: Ensure job is required for release approval
